backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing customer, job, and appointment management with Internet Identity authorization, including CRUD operations and access control for a mold removal business.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: customer management interface, job history timeline, calendar interface, job status management, and Internet Identity authentication integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Phoenix Shield application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with earth-tone OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode color variables for the application theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Phoenix Shield Mold Removal Business App with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with protected routes, authentication guards, theme provider, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that appears after authentication if no profile exists, with form validation.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Appoint: Modal dialog displaying appointment details including customer name, date, time, duration, and job type with icon-based layout.

Dialog form component for scheduling appointments with fields for customer selection, date/time, job type, and duration. Handles form state, validation, and converts date/time to BigInt timestamps for submission.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Monthly: Monthly calendar grid component that displays appointments by date, supports navigation between months, and provides click handlers for dates and appointments. Shows up to 2 appointments per day with overflow indicator.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: Card component displaying customer summary information including name, contact details (phone, email, address), and job history count. Provides click handler for viewing full customer details.
Dialog form component for creating or editing customers with fields for name, phone, email, and physical address. Supports both add and edit modes with loading states.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobCard.tsx: Card component displaying job details including service type, date, customer, issues found, and status. Includes inline status update dropdown with mutation handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobHistoryT: Timeline component that fetches and displays a customer's job history sorted by date. Shows loading skeleton, empty state, or list of job cards with service details and status badges.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobStatusBa: Badge component that renders job status (completed, in progress, scheduled) with appropriate color-coded styling for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Navigation header component with logo, desktop/mobile nav menus (Customers, Calendar, Jobs), user profile display, and login button. Uses Sheet component for mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper component that includes Header, main content area, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution and copyright notice.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, customers, jobs, and appointments data through the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom earth-tone color palette defined using CSS variables for both light and dark modes, including primary (warm green) and secondary (warm brown) colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar page component displaying monthly calendar view with appointments, handling date/appointment clicks, and showing forms for creating new appointments with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Customer detail page showing contact information (phone, email, address) and job history timeline for a specific customer, with navigation back to customer list.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Displays a grid of customer cards with loading states, empty state, and a form dialog to create new customers; handles navigation to individual customer detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Shows jobs in a tabbed interface filtered by status (all, scheduled, in-progress, completed) with loading and empty states; renders job cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with hero background image, branding, and LoginButton component for authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, typography plugin, and custom animations for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Phoenix Shield as a mold removal business management app with Internet Identity auth, mobile-responsive design, AI social media features, and comprehensive CRM/operations tracking.
